summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Romanian restaurant app with new features: referral system, dev quick-login, loyalty points, and ROTW. Backend 100% success (17/17 tests), frontend fully functional with all features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: React DevTools deprecation warnings and shadow* style props deprecated warnings

passed_tests: POST /api/referral/apply with own code - properly fails with 400
POST /api/referral/apply with fake code - properly fails with 404
GET /api/loyalty/leaderboard - returns users sorted by points
GET /api/loyalty/my-points - returns points data for authenticated user
GET /api/restaurant-of-the-week - returns ROTW data after selection
Frontend login page shows dev accounts (Admin + Utilizator Test)
Dev login as Admin navigates to /acasa page with greeting
Loyalty page /loyalty loads with 3 tabs (Puncte, Clasament, Referral)
All loyalty tabs are clickable and functional
ROTW banner displays correctly with discount
Restaurant listings and search functionality working
Leaderboard shows users with points and levels correctly
